basic_details.short_information: Indian Council of Medical Research (ICMR) Consultant (Engineering- BSL-3/BSL-4) Notification 2026 has been released under Advt. No. V-9/2026/CD on the official website of ICMR. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICMR Consultant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 60 years Age relaxation will be as per Govt. of India Norms.

qualification.education_qualification: BE/BTech in Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, HVAC Engineering, Biosafety Engineering, or related discipline with 8 years experience, Retired Government employees in Pay Level 10 and above with 10 years experience
qualification.details: Professionals with BE/Btech in Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, HVAC Engineering, Biosafety Engineering, or related discipline with a minimum experience of 8 years post-qualification criteria. OR Retired Government employees, with requisite qualification and who were in the regular Pay Level 10 and above and having at least 10 years’ experience in the required specialization.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICMR Consultant (Engineering- BSL-3/BSL-4) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download ICMR Consultant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICMR Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the ICMR Consultant (Engineering- BSL-3/BSL-4) post is 24th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a BE/BTech in Mechanical, Electrical, HVAC, or Biosafety Engineering with 8 years of experience, or retired government employees with relevant qualifications and 10 years of experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Consultant post is 60 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Consultant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 100,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this ICMR recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via email with all required documents attached. Ensure you send it before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Consultant role?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve a Personal Discussion with the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Consultant (Engineering- BSL-3/BSL-4).

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position offered by the Indian Council of Medical Research.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the ICMR located?
faq.answer: The ICMR is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110029.
